channel.title: PI on QUANTUM INFORMATION WITH TRAPPED IONS
channel.description: Recent content in PI on QUANTUM INFORMATION WITH TRAPPED IONS

item.title: Dr. K. Rajibul Islam
item.description: Associate Professor, Institute for Quantum Computing and Department of Physics and Astronomy, University of Waterloo UW Physics and Astronomy profile , IQC Profile , CV Affiliate, Perimeter Institute for Theoretical Physics Co-founder, Open Quantum Design Co-founder and Chief Scientific Advisor, Lightflow Optics Inc. VAIBHAV fellow, Department of Science and Technology, Government of India (2024 - )
